project.name: private-ai-roleplay
project.description: A privacy-first, browser-based AI roleplay application. Your API key and conversations exist only in your browser memory.

nodes.name: App.tsx
nodes.summary: Root React component orchestrating the application layout by composing Header, Sidebar, ChatArea, SettingsModal, CharacterEditor, and the new AboutModal with responsive sidebar toggle state.

nodes.name: App
nodes.summary: Default exported React component serving as the application root, managing sidebar open/close state and composing all major UI sections including modals.

nodes.name: AboutModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Informational modal explaining the app's privacy model (no server storage), BYOK concept, session export reminder, and API key best practice of generating a dedicated key and deleting it after use.

nodes.name: AboutModal
nodes.summary: Default exported component displaying privacy education content in a dismissible modal with close button and 'Got it' confirmation.

nodes.name: CharacterEditor.tsx
nodes.summary: Modal component for creating and editing custom AI roleplay characters with form fields for name, description, personality, scenario, greeting, and custom rules that auto-generate a system prompt.

nodes.name: CharacterEditor
nodes.summary: Main editor component providing create/edit/delete functionality for custom characters with inline prompt preview generation.

nodes.name: Header.tsx
nodes.summary: Application header bar displaying the app title, sidebar toggle button, and API key connection status indicator derived from the Zustand UI store.

nodes.name: Header
nodes.summary: Default exported component rendering the top bar with menu toggle, branding, and green/red dot indicator for API key status.

nodes.name: SettingsModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Settings modal for configuring the DeepSeek API key, displayed inline in chat. The API key is stored only in browser memory via Zustand and never persisted to disk or server.

nodes.name: SettingsModal
nodes.summary: Default exported component providing API key input with masked display, set/clear controls, and privacy notice.

nodes.name: Header.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Unit tests for Header verifying title rendering, sidebar toggle, and API key status indicator.

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.summary: Application entry point creating the React root, mounting App, and importing global CSS.

nodes.name: apiKeyStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for apiKeyStore verifying key set, clear, and hasApiKey derived state.

nodes.name: uiStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the UI Zustand store verifying sidebar toggle, modals, and about modal state.

nodes.name: apiKeyStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store holding the DeepSeek API key exclusively in browser memory with setApiKey, clearApiKey actions and derived hasApiKey boolean.

nodes.name: useApiKeyStore
nodes.summary: Exported Zustand hook providing API key state management.

nodes.name: uiStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store managing global UI state: sidebar visibility, settings modal, character editor, and about modal toggles.

nodes.name: useUIStore
nodes.summary: Exported Zustand hook providing UI state with actions for all modal toggles and sidebar control.

nodes.name: ChatArea.tsx
nodes.summary: Main chat view container conditionally rendering MessageList and MessageComposer when a character is selected, or EmptyState when none is active.

nodes.name: ChatArea
nodes.summary: Default exported component composing EmptyState, MessageList, and MessageComposer based on character selection state.

nodes.name: EmptyState.tsx
nodes.summary: Welcome screen displayed when no character is selected, prompting the user to pick one from the sidebar.

nodes.name: MessageComposer.tsx
nodes.summary: Chat input component with auto-resize textarea, Enter-to-send, Shift+Enter for newline, editing state display with cancel button, and auto-focus after sending/streaming.

nodes.name: MessageComposer
nodes.summary: Default exported chat input managing text state, keyboard shortcuts, editing pre-fill, cancel editing, and dispatching messages to the chat store.

nodes.name: MessageList.tsx
nodes.summary: Scrollable message history display with auto-scroll, edit button on user messages, rehype-sanitize markdown rendering, and editing-aware message filtering (hides messages from editing point onwards).

nodes.name: MessageList
nodes.summary: Default exported component rendering scrollable chat log with edit buttons, editing-state filtering, and sanitized markdown.

nodes.name: StreamingMessage.tsx
nodes.summary: Component rendering streaming assistant messages via SSE with sanitized markdown and a blinking cursor indicator.

nodes.name: EmptyState.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Unit test for EmptyState verifying welcome message and character selection prompt.

nodes.name: config.ts
nodes.summary: Application configuration exporting the API base URL constant from Vite environment variable.

nodes.name: chatStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for chat store covering sendMessage, streaming, editing truncation, context trimming, and timeout handling.

nodes.name: chatStore.ts
nodes.summary: Core Zustand store managing the full chat lifecycle: SSE streaming with 120s timeout, message editing with truncation, context window management, session export/import, and editing state for backtrack-and-branch workflow.

nodes.name: useChatStore
nodes.summary: Exported Zustand hook providing chat state with sendMessage (SSE+timeout+editing truncation), startEditing, cancelEditing, importMessages, and session export.

nodes.name: character.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript interface defining the Character data model with name, description, personality, scenario, greeting, system prompt preview, custom rules, and built-in flag.

nodes.name: message.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript type for chat messages with id, role (system/user/assistant), content, and timestamp.

nodes.name: session.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript type for session export format with version, timestamp, character info, and messages array.

nodes.name: contextManager.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for context manager verifying token estimation and message trimming under limits.

nodes.name: promptBuilder.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for prompt builder verifying system prompt generation from character fields.

nodes.name: sessionIO.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for session export/import covering JSON download, file upload parsing, validation, and 5MB size cap.

nodes.name: contextManager.ts
nodes.summary: Context window management utility trimming chat history to token limits while preserving system messages and the first user message.

nodes.name: trimMessages
nodes.summary: Trims messages to max token limit, preserving system and first user messages.

nodes.name: estimateTokens
nodes.summary: Estimates token count from text length using character-to-token ratio.

nodes.name: estimateTotalTokens
nodes.summary: Estimates total tokens across all messages in an array.

nodes.name: promptBuilder.ts
nodes.summary: Utility constructing system prompts for DeepSeek by combining character attributes and roleplay rules into structured prompt strings.

nodes.name: buildSystemPrompt
nodes.summary: Builds a complete system prompt from a Character object with all fields and numbered roleplay rules.

nodes.name: buildSystemPromptFromParts
nodes.summary: Builds system prompt from individual string parameters, delegating to buildSystemPrompt.

nodes.name: sessionIO.ts
nodes.summary: Session export/download and import/upload utilities with 5MB file size cap, JSON validation, and message structure verification.

nodes.name: exportSession
nodes.summary: Serializes session to JSON, creates a Blob download URL, and triggers browser file download.

nodes.name: importSession
nodes.summary: Reads and validates an uploaded JSON file with 5MB size check, schema validation, and message field verification.

nodes.name: builtIn.ts
nodes.summary: Defines four built-in AI roleplay characters — Fantasy Mage, Cyberpunk Hacker, Space Captain, Noir Detective — with personality profiles, scenarios, greetings, and roleplay rules.

nodes.name: CharacterSelector.tsx
nodes.summary: Character selection panel listing all available characters with selection highlight, edit button, and click-to-select for starting new chats.

nodes.name: CharacterSelector
nodes.summary: Default exported component rendering scrollable character list with selection state and editor trigger.

nodes.name: Sidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Collapsible sidebar with character selection, new chat, custom character creation, session export/import, and About button for privacy education modal access.

nodes.name: Sidebar
nodes.summary: Default exported component rendering the side navigation with character list, action buttons, and session file I/O.

nodes.name: characterStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for character store covering built-in loading, custom character CRUD, selection, and defaults.

nodes.name: characterStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store managing character state: merges built-in and custom characters, CRUD for customs, selection, and system prompt retrieval.

nodes.name: useCharacterStore
nodes.summary: Exported Zustand hook providing character state with create, edit, delete, and select actions.

nodes.name: uuid.ts
nodes.summary: Lightweight UUID v4 generator using Math.random for unique identifiers.

nodes.name: v4
nodes.summary: Generates RFC 4122 v4 UUID using Math.random with standard hex formatting.

nodes.name: CLOUDFLARE.md
nodes.summary: Deployment guide for Cloudflare Pages (frontend) and Workers (backend) covering API token creation, wrangler setup, deployment, testing, and troubleshooting.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview documenting architecture, features, quick start, scripts, environment variables, deployment, and project structure.

nodes.name: SPEC.md
nodes.summary: Full technical specification covering objectives, architecture, privacy requirements, features, UI layout, data models, DeepSeek integration, and acceptance criteria.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: HTML entry point for the Vite-built React app with dark theme and root mount div.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Root package manifest for private-ai-roleplay with npm scripts, React 19, Zustand, react-markdown deps, and Vite/Vitest/Tailwind/ESLint/Prettier dev tooling.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript config with strict mode, JSX for React, ESNext modules, bundler resolution, and node config reference.

nodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript config for Node build tooling (Vite, Vitest) with CommonJS and composite project references.

nodes.name: worker/package.json
nodes.summary: Worker sub-package manifest with dev/test scripts, wrangler and vitest dev deps, and miniflare workerd runtime.

nodes.name: worker/tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript config for CF Worker targeting ES2022 with worker runtime types and strict mode.

nodes.name: worker/wrangler.toml
nodes.summary: Wrangler deployment config confirming zero-persistence architecture — no KV, D1, R2, or Durable Objects bindings.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: ESLint flat config with TypeScript-aware linting, React hooks/refresh plugins, and Prettier integration.

nodes.name: postcss.config.js
nodes.summary: PostCSS config enabling Tailwind CSS v4 and Autoprefixer.

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind layers with custom dark theme, scrollbar styling, and prose typography for markdown.

nodes.name: test-setup.ts
nodes.summary: Test environment setup importing jest-dom matchers for Vitest DOM assertions.

nodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: Vite environment type declaration for TypeScript with import.meta.env support.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite config for React frontend with React plugin, Tailwind v4, Cloudflare plugin, and API proxy to local Worker.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest config with jsdom environment, global test functions, setup file, and CSS module support.

nodes.name: index.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for Worker verifying API proxy, request validation, CORS, DeepSeek response proxying, and error handling.

nodes.name: worker/src/index.ts
nodes.summary: Stateless Cloudflare Worker relay proxy: accepts chat requests, attaches API key header, forwards to DeepSeek with 8192 max_tokens and streaming, returns SSE response — no logging or persistence.

nodes.name: jsonResponse
nodes.summary: Helper constructing standardized JSON responses with request ID, latency, and CORS headers.

nodes.name: worker/vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest config for Worker tests using workerd runtime for Cloudflare Workers simulation.

layers.name: UI Components
layers.description: React functional components forming the chat interface: character selection, chat area, message display, streaming indicator, sidebar, settings modal, character editor, and the About privacy education modal. Plus the global Tailwind CSS stylesheet.

layers.name: State Management
layers.description: Zustand stores managing application state: API key in browser memory, character CRUD, chat messages with SSE streaming, editing, and timeout handling, and global UI state (sidebar, modals, about).

layers.name: Types & Data Models
layers.description: TypeScript interfaces for Character, Message, and Session, plus the four built-in roleplay character definitions.

layers.name: Utilities
layers.description: Shared utilities for system prompt construction, context token management, session JSON export/import with 5MB size cap, and UUID generation — pure functions with no UI.

layers.name: Entry Points & Bootstrap
layers.description: Application entry point, root component, API config, Vite/Vitest configs, ESLint/PostCSS tooling, HTML entry, and TypeScript environment declarations.

layers.name: Cloudflare Worker Backend
layers.description: Stateless relay proxy accepting chat requests from browser, attaching API key to DeepSeek call with 8192 max_tokens streaming, returning SSE — zero persistence or logging.

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Unit and integration tests covering UI components, Zustand stores, utility functions, and the Cloudflare Worker API proxy.

layers.name: Project Configuration & Documentation
layers.description: Project-level config (package manifests, TypeScript settings) and documentation (README, technical spec, deployment guide).

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand the project's purpose: a privacy-first AI roleplay app where your API key and conversations exist only in browser memory. The package manifest shows the full dependency stack.

tour.title: Application Entry Point
tour.description: The HTML entry and main.tsx bootstrap React. App.tsx orchestrates all UI sections including the new AboutModal for privacy education.

tour.title: Type System & Characters
tour.description: Three TypeScript interfaces define the domain: Character (with rules), Message, and Session. builtIn.ts provides four roleplay characters with full personality profiles.

tour.title: State Management
tour.description: Four Zustand stores: apiKeyStore (browser-only key), characterStore (CRUD), chatStore (SSE streaming with 120s timeout and message editing), and uiStore (modals including About).

tour.title: Chat Interface
tour.description: The chat UI: Sidebar with export/import/About, ChatArea composing EmptyState/MessageList/MessageComposer, StreamingMessage for SSE responses, and editing support for backtrack-and-branch.

tour.title: Character & Settings UI
tour.description: CharacterSelector lists characters, CharacterEditor provides create/edit forms, SettingsModal handles API key input, Header shows connection status, and AboutModal educates on privacy.

tour.title: Utilities
tour.description: promptBuilder constructs system prompts, contextManager trims history to token limits, sessionIO handles JSON export/import with 5MB cap and rehype-sanitize safety, uuid generates identifiers.

tour.title: Cloudflare Worker Backend
tour.description: The stateless relay proxy accepts chat requests, attaches the API key to DeepSeek calls with 8192 max_tokens, and streams SSE back. wrangler.toml confirms zero persistence.

tour.title: Testing Strategy
tour.description: Tests cover stores, utilities, components, and the Worker integration — verifying streaming, editing truncation, session validation, and API proxy behavior.

tour.title: Build, Config & Deployment
tour.description: Vite/Tailwind/ESLint/TypeScript configs wire up the build pipeline. SPEC.md is the technical spec, CLOUDFLARE.md the deployment guide for Pages + Workers.
